n: Effigy of the Martyr: Albinauric Rise

d: Summoning Pool Effigy in the Divine Tower of Caelid after the Center Site of Grace, just down the stairs. Activate this effigy to send your summon sign to this summoning pool.

Boc appears in the East Capital Rampart site of grace. You have to rest at this Site of Grace for him to appear. He offers his sewing services as well as makes some conversation regarding the Erdtree.

n: Waygate to Liurnia West (from Liurnia East)
d: Waygate teleports players to the western side of Liurnia of the Lakes, by the Northern Liurnia Lakeshore Site of Grace
Waygate accessible only after completing the Evergaol Puzzle at Ordina, Liturgical Town
Waygate. Teleports players to the underground area beneath Caelid, called Mohgwyn Palace

A Teleporter Waygate at The Four Belfries that transports you to section of Nokron, Eternal City/ Siofra River(Underground area that is inaccessable without a waygate to access). Requires an Imbued Sword Key.
Waypoint Ruins consists of a group of broken buildings and abandoned campsites, now overrun with poisonous flowers and their crazed caretaker.
Site of grace in the cellar of the Waypoint Ruins.
Evergaol imprisoning the Ancient Hero of Zamor boss. Requires a Stonesword Key to unlock the portal mechanism.
Site of grace

Key Item. Found in the southeastern area of Gatefront Ruins. There is a set of stairs that leads to a small room with a treasure chest. This item is found alongside the Ash of War: Storm Stomp upgrade.

Whip. Found on a corpse inside the building known as the Rampart Gaol. This building is first accessed by walking atop the western wall of the castle. Look to the left for a building with a blue roof. Jump onto this roof and then jump down to the cli
Dropped from a Teardrop Scarab on the road between Rotview Balcony and Caelem Ruins next to the wagon.
White Reed Armor Set excluding the Helm. Found on a corpse inside the Spiritcaller's Cave, in a long cavern filled with spirit wolves.
White-Faced Varre, Location 1. Found right next to The First Step Site of Grace. Provides Lore info. You will encounter this NPC multiple times in different locations.
White-Faced Varre, Location 2. Found standing outside of the Rose Church. Gives you the Festering Bloody Finger after exhausting his dialogue.
Site of Grace found near the Guardians Garrison.
Site of Grace
Site of Grace in the Windmill Village
The item can be found in Caelid in a pit southeast of the Nomadic Merchant Caelid South. One of the birds watches over it, facing south.
Crystal Tear for the Flask of Wondrous Physick. Found on an altar surrounded by Skull enemies.
Spirit Ash. Found on a corpse in a pit inside the Unsightly Catacombs.
Located In the center of Tombsward Ruins, there is a set of stairs leading underground into a dark hall with a door to a small room at the end. The scythe is inside a chest in the small room.
Talisman. Dropped by the Cleanrot Knight boss inside the Stillwater Cave.
Dropped by Sorceress Sellen, by completing her questline and after defeating her.

Witch-Hunter Jerren is first spoken to in Castle Redmane just north of the Chamber Outside the Plaza Site of Grace. He is found here after the defeat of Starscourge Radahn. If he is not found in this location, he is likey already at his second locat
Witch-Hunter Jerren appears here while progressing through the Sorceress Sellen questline. He may be first encountered in Castle Redmane after the defeat of Starscourge Radahn.

Ruins found south of the Fourth Church of Marika. Teeming with hostiles.
Greatshield. Found in a guardhouse near the northern section of the castle courtyard.
East of the Minor Erdtree in Altus Plateau
Boss located at the base of the Minor Erdtree. Drops Speckled Hardtear and Crimsonspill Crystal Tear
Boss. Located in Crumbling Farum Azula
Boss. Wormface Bosses are usually located within the vicinity of the Minor Erdtree (Mt. Gelmir)
Offensive Consumable Item. Found in a chest in a small room of an underground aea in the northwestern section of the Laskyar Ruins. Find a set of steps leading downwards to locate the area.
Found at  Woodfolk Ruins. Among the enemies, there is a staircase that goes down and leads to a chest that contains this  Incantation
A set of ruins overlooking a forest where the Altus Plateau's Minor Erdtree can be found.
Mini Dungeon. The entrance is found at the top of Wyndham Ruins.
Site of Grace found right by the catacombs' entrance.
A large set of ruins south west of the Old Altus Tunnel.
Can be found near to Callu Baptismal Church on a dead body in front of the tent.
Crafting Material. Looted off a corpse on the slopes leading to Frenzy-Flaming Tower in eastern Bellum Highway.
A set of ruins found west of the Consecrated Snowfield.
Tunnels in Western Consecrated Snowfield, rich in very rare smithing materials.

n: Yelough Anix Tunnel Site of Grace
d: Located inside Yelough Anix Tunnel
Curved Greatsword. Dropped by the Ancient Hero of Zamor inside the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave upon defeat.
Snow Witch Sorcery. Found on a corpse in the southern section of the Zamor Ruins, by a stone archway.
Once you reach Mountaintops of the Giants, past Shabriri.
Site of Grace found near the path towards Zamor Ruins.
Armor Set comprised of Zamor Mask, Zamor Armor, Zamor Bracelets and Zamor Legwraps. Dropped by the Ancient Hero of Zamor Boss inside the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave upon defeat.
